narrative:
Ruggles-Combined township has 618 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.0 percentage points.
